Source   Edit  

abstraction over schemas by attaching to a type

Imports

schema, query, typemacros

Types

FabricColumn = object
  schemaId*: SchemaId
  num*: int
Source   Edit   
FabricKind = enum
  Warm, Cold
Source   Edit   
FabricOptions = object
  requiresFreeze*: bool
  id*: string
Source   Edit   
SomeFabric = concept
    proc getFabricSchemaId(self: typedesc[Self]): SchemaId
Source   Edit
